headline: Turkey Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026-2031 Featuring COMnet Solutions, DataCasa, Equinix, NGN, PenDC, Radore, Sadece Hosting, Sparkle, Telehouse, Turk Telekom, Turkcell, Vodafone
summary: The Turkey Data Center Market is poised for significant growth, with a projection to escalate from USD 715 Million in 2025 to USD 1.79 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 16.56%. headline: FERC approves ComEd data center transmission agreements
summary: FERC Chairman Swett and Commissioner LaCerte pushed back on concerns over inadequate review of ratepayer impacts: “The Commission will always reject a rate that seriously harms the consuming public.”
